channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: ‘Tit-for-tat’ trade warfare threatens global economy, says IMF chief economist
item.description: <![CDATA[‘Tit-for-tat’ trade warfare threatens global economy, says IMF chief economist]]>

item.title: Tech stocks just had one of their worst weeks in a year. Here’s how AI momentum went off the rails.

item.title: Bond yields are falling as inflation pops. The Fed’s tough talk under Warsh is helping.
item.description: <![CDATA[Bond yields are falling as inflation pops. The Fed’s tough talk under Warsh is helping.]]>

item.title: Fed’s Kashkari now projects one interest-rate hike this year. Here’s what changed his mind.

item.title: US derivatives watchdog probes predictions market Polymarket
item.description: <![CDATA[US derivatives watchdog probes predictions market Polymarket]]>

item.title: S&P 500 notches longest losing streak in 10 months as chipmakers slide

item.title: Trump warns of 100% tariff on countries implementing digital services tax
